entity.summary: HyperEVM liquidity hub and decentralized exchange providing token swaps, AMM liquidity pools, cross-chain swaps, multi-token routing, liquidity provision, fee earning, and staking incentives.
entity.notes: Current first-party HyperSwap documentation identifies the protocol as the liquidity hub of HyperEVM and documents spot swaps, cross-chain swaps, multi-token routes, AMM liquidity, liquidity provision, fee earning, and staking rewards. HEI consolidates V2 and V3 discovery rows under one exchange entity.

evidence.title: HyperSwap Documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies HyperSwap as the liquidity hub of HyperEVM and documents swaps, AMM liquidity, cross-chain swaps, multi-token routing, liquidity provision, fee earning, and staking incentives.

evidence.title: HyperSwap official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party HyperSwap application endpoint is reachable and linked from the official documentation as the live trading and liquidity interface.

evidence.title: HyperSwap V2 and V3 DEX discovery entries
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus identifies HyperSwap V2 and V3 on Hyperliquid L1/HyperEVM; HEI consolidates those version rows into one HyperSwap entity.
